customManagers.description: Update pinned nfpm version in release workflow

packageRules.description: Pin to 0.11.x — erl_dist 0.8 (latest) still requires eetf 0.11. Lift this when sile/erl_dist releases a version on eetf 0.12.
Pin to 1.x — ex_aws 2.6.1 (latest) still requires hackney ~> 1.16. Lift this when ex_aws supports hackney 2+.
Pin to 2.x — bincode 3.0 was published only as an unmaintained-project notice (lib.rs is a compile_error!). bincode-org repo was archived 2025-08-15. Stay on 2.x until a maintained successor exists.
